name: J'ande's Salmon En Papillote
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 500 degrees.
2. Melt butter and stir in the lemon juice. Adjust amount of lemon juice to taste.
3. Cut 2 circles, each measuring approximately 10-11 inches, from parchment paper.
4. Slice zucchini and yellow hook squash into 4 thin slices each. Cut onion into 1/8 inch slices. Season all vegetables with salt if desired.
5. Heat a large cast iron skillet over medium-high heat. Coat the skillet with non-stick cooking spray and sear both sides of the vegetables, ensuring they are not sautéed.
6. On half of each parchment circle, layer onion and zucchini slices. Generously season salmon fillets with garlic powder, dill weed, thyme, rosemary, and salt if desired. Layer the yellow hook squash and green pepper on top.
7. Fold each parchment circle over to create a sealed envelope, leaving an opening for spooning in the melted lemon butter mixture.
8. Spoon 4 tablespoons of melted lemon butter, 2 tablespoons of wine, and 2 tablespoons of Grand Marnier into each envelope.
9. Seal the envelopes completely.
10. Place in the preheated oven at 500 degrees and bake for 7 minutes. Serve immediately.
